changes: Room options in multiplayer now use a local draft with explicit confirm or cancel, so rapid option changes no longer send requests one by one.
Track selection in room options now uses a full track flow (race track, street adventure, random) instead of a radio toggle.
Closing loadout now asks whether to quit race preparation; choosing yes keeps the player in the room and excludes them from the current preparation round.
Room slot numbering was fixed to stay compact (no gaps like player 3 and player 5 when fewer players are present).
Fixed multiplayer room options behavior so the menu has no title and closing after track selection no longer exits the game.
Radio track navigation now announces only the current file name when moving between playlist items.
Fixed radio playlist behavior so folder playlists continue advancing between files even when you are outside the radio panel.
Opening a radio folder now resets the playlist to that folder and starts from its first entry using current playback state.
Turn-end ding timing was corrected to trigger exactly when the car exits a turn and enters a straight segment.
serverChanges: Added server support for race-preparation withdrawal, allowing a player to skip the current prep round without leaving the room.
Race preparation now starts only with ready participants and cancels clearly when there are not enough active racers after loadout decisions.
Room numbering now compacts player and bot slots after joins/leaves so assignments remain contiguous and predictable.
Server release revision updated for protocol compatibility alignment with the latest client.
